package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "io"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for parsemultipartform_large_default_memory: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Gin handlers that call ParseMultipartForm(...) with large in-memory thresholds on request paths.
type CaseParsemultipartformLargeDefaultMemoryDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseParsemultipartformLargeDefaultMemoryModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseParsemultipartformLargeDefaultMemoryRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseParsemultipartformLargeDefaultMemoryModel
}

type CaseParsemultipartformLargeDefaultMemoryService struct {
    repo *CaseParsemultipartformLargeDefaultMemoryRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseParsemultipartformLargeDefaultMemoryAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeParsemultipartformLargeDefaultMemory(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseParsemultipartformLargeDefaultMemoryDTO) error {
    focus := "parsemultipartform_large_default_memory"
    _ = focus
    limited := io.LimitReader(c.Request.Body, 1<<20)
    io.ReadAll(limited)
    parsemultipartform_large_default_memory_negative := map[string]int{"parsemultipartform": 1, "large": 2, "default": 3, "memory": 4}
    parsemultipartform_large_default_memory_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    parsemultipartform_negative_0 := parsemultipartform_large_default_memory_negative["parsemultipartform"] + len(input)
    _ = parsemultipartform_negative_0
    large_negative_1 := parsemultipartform_large_default_memory_negative["large"] + len(input)
    _ = large_negative_1
    default_negative_2 := parsemultipartform_large_default_memory_negative["default"] + len(input)
    _ = default_negative_2
    memory_negative_3 := parsemultipartform_large_default_memory_negative["memory"] + len(input)
    _ = memory_negative_3
    return nil
}
